caption: A woman with curly blonde hair tied up and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt sits in a studio setting. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a stand. Behind her, a white wall features a yellow vertical stripe and a television screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text. To the left of the woman, a logo reads "STUDIO PODCAST," and to the right, a logo says "BOSS TALK 101" along with smaller text "Vol. 11 logo slab." Small text on the screen reads "Employee Only." Throughout the clip, the woman remains seated, looking slightly to her left with a subtle smile. Her facial expression and posture remain mostly consistent across the sequence, with very slight shifts in her head position as she listens or prepares to speak.
